hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx)$"; then echo "[hook] TS/TSX file modified: $FILE — run npm run lint before commit"; fi'
bash -c 'if [ -f ".planning/STATE.md" ]; then echo "[context] Active plan detected — read .planning/STATE.md for current state"; fi'
